title: impatiens clavicuspis var. brevicuspis
intro: Impatiens clavicuspis var. brevicuspis, a variety of the balsam pearlflower plant, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving fever, reducing pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Impatiens clavicuspis var. brevicuspis are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
